stem:
y = 6x + 18

One of the equations in a system of two linear equations is given. The system has no solution. Which equation could be the second equation in the system?
explanation: A system has no solution when the two lines are parallel but distinct, meaning the same slope with a different intercept. Rewriting the given line as −6x + y = 18 shows slope 6; the choice −6x + y = 22 has the same left side but a different constant, so it is parallel and distinct.
